items.title: Be 动词（am/is/are）的用法
items.rule: 主语 + be动词 + 表语

examples.句: I am a student.
She is tall.
They are in the classroom.

exercises.题: My name ____ Li Ming.
I ____ from China.
You and I ____ friends.
My father ____ a teacher.
We ____ students at No. 7 Middle School.
The weather ____ nice today.
I ____ twelve years old.
Tom and Jerry ____ friends.
This ____ my new pen.
These books ____ mine.
She ____ from Australia.

items.title: 一般现在时
items.rule: 主语 + 动词原形/动词-s/es（第三人称单数）

examples.句: I play football every day.
She plays football every day.

exercises.题: He ____ (watch) TV every day.
They ____ (like) apples.
My mother ____ (cook) dinner.
He always ____ to school on foot.
I ____ English every morning.
My sister ____ the piano well.
exercises.提示: play 加 s, 元音加 s

exercises.题: They ____ to the park on Sundays.
Water ____ at 100 degrees.
exercises.提示: 主语是不可数名词也当单数

exercises.题: She ____ up at six every day.
Tom ____ like milk.
____ your father work in a hospital?
exercises.提示: 一般疑问句借助于 Does

items.title: 现在进行时
items.rule: 主语 + am/is/are + 动词-ing

items.title: There be 句型
items.rule: There is/are + 名词 + 地点/时间

examples.句: There is a book on the desk.
There are 20 students in our class.

exercises.题: There ____ a pencil in the box.
There ____ many books on the shelf.
____ there any milk in the fridge?
____ a bank near your house?
There ____ many students in the classroom.
There ____ a book and two pens on the desk.
exercises.提示: 就近原则, 第一个是单数

exercises.题: There ____ some milk in the bottle.
There aren't ____ apples in the box.
There is a river ____ the village.
____ there any water in the glass?
There ____ a lot of people in the park yesterday.

items.title: 疑问词与疑问句
items.rule: 疑问词 + be动词/助动词 + 主语 + ...？

examples.句: What is your name?
Where do you live?
How are you?

exercises.题: ____ is your name?
____ is your mother? She's at home.
____ is your birthday? It's in May.
____ is your favorite color?
____ old are you?
____ does your father work?
____ is your best friend?
____ book is this, yours or mine?
____ did you buy the present? Last Sunday.
____ are the oranges? Three yuan a kilo.

items.title: 情态动词 can/may/must
items.rule: 主语 + 情态动词 + 动词原形

examples.句: I can swim.
You must finish your homework.
You mustn't smoke here.

exercises.题: I ____ swim well.
You ____ go now. It's late.
You ____ play with fire. It's dangerous.
____ I use your pen, please?
She ____ speak three languages.
You ____ finish your homework before 9 p.m.
____ you help me, please?
He ____ swim when he was five.
You ____ not talk loudly in the library.
It ____ rain tomorrow, I'm not sure.
We ____ wear sports shoes for P.E. class.

items.title: 名词（可数/不可数/所有格）
items.rule: 名词分可数和不可数；所有格用's或 of

examples.句: I have two children.
This is Tom's book.

exercises.题: There are three ____ (child) in the room.
She drank a glass of ____ (milk).
exercises.提示: milk是不可数名词，不用复数

exercises.题: This is my ____ (mother) bag.
The ____ (teacher) office is large.
exercises.提示: 复数名词以s结尾，所有格只加撇

exercises.题: I need some ____ (information) about the city.
exercises.提示: information是不可数名词，没有复数

exercises.题: I have two ____ (baby).
She bought five ____ (tomato) at the market.
There is much ____ (water) in the bottle.
I have a piece of ____ (paper) for you.
exercises.提示: paper 不可数, 用 a piece of

exercises.题: These ____ (photo) are very beautiful.
My sister's ____ (friend) came to see her.

items.title: 冠词（a / an / the）
items.rule: a/an表泛指，the表特指；元音音标开头用an

examples.句: She is a teacher.
An hour later, he arrived.

exercises.题: He is ____ honest boy.
There is ____ university near here.
She plays ____ piano every day.
We have ____ breakfast at seven. (填 no article)
This is ____ most interesting book I have ever read.

exercises.提示: honest 元音开头 (h 不发音)

exercises.题: ____ sun is bright today.

exercises.题: He plays ____ piano after dinner.
I had ____ egg and a glass of milk for breakfast.
We usually have ____ lunch at 12.

exercises.提示: 专名城市/国家不加 the

exercises.题: He is ____ tallest boy in his class.
exercises.提示: 形容词最高级前用 the

items.title: 代词（人称/物主/指示）
items.rule: 人称代词分主格宾格，物主代词分形容词性和名词性

examples.句: I like her.
This book is mine.

exercises.题: ____ (I) am a student.

exercises.题: ____ is the capital of China.

exercises.题: She teaches ____ English every day.

exercises.提示: 肯定句中可数复数用 some

exercises.题: He hurt ____ when he fell down.

exercises.提示: 名词性物主代词单独用

items.title: 形容词比较级与最高级
items.rule: 比较级 + than；最高级 + in/of 范围，前加 the

examples.句: He is taller than his brother.
This is the most beautiful city in China.

exercises.题: Tom is ____ (tall) than Jack.

items.title: 数量词（some / any / many / much / a few / a little）
items.rule: some肯定句，any疑问否定句；many复数，much不可数

exercises.题: There are ____ apples on the table.
Do you have ____ questions?

There is only ____ milk in the cup.
Can I have ____ water, please?

items.title: 祈使句与感叹句
items.rule: 祈使句用动词原形开头；感叹句用What或How开头

examples.句: Don't be late!
What a beautiful flower it is!

exercises.题: ____ (not be) late for class.
exercises.提示: 祈使句否定用Don't + 动词原形

exercises.题: ____ beautiful the park is!
exercises.提示: How + 形容词引导感叹句

exercises.题: ____ a lovely girl she is!
exercises.提示: What + a/an + 形容词引导感叹句

exercises.题: Let's ____ (go) shopping.
____ quiet in the library, please.
exercises.提示: 祈使句以动词原形开头, Be quiet 表状态

exercises.题: ____ your seat belt before driving.
Don't ____ in class.
exercises.提示: 否定祈使句 Don't + 动词原形

exercises.题: ____ a good time on your trip!
exercises.提示: Have a good time 是常用表达

exercises.题: ____ careful! The road is slippery.
____ the door when you leave.

exercises.提示: What + 名词 + 主语 + be!

exercises.题: ____ how tall the building is!
exercises.提示: Look + how + 形容词 + 主语 + be!

items.title: 宾语从句
items.rule: 主句 + 连词 + 主语 + 谓语（陈述语序）

examples.句: I think that he is honest.
I don't know where he lives.

exercises.题: I think ____ (that) she will come.
exercises.提示: that引导宾语从句，可以省略

exercises.题: Can you tell me where ____ (the museum is / is the museum)?
exercises.提示: 宾语从句用陈述语序，不是问句语序

exercises.题: He said he ____ (was / is) tired.
exercises.提示: 主句过去时，从句往后退一个时态（现在时→过去时）

exercises.题: I wonder ____ she likes the movie.
exercises.提示: if表示是否，引导宾语从句

exercises.题: I believe ____ he said is true.
exercises.提示: what 引导宾语从句作 believe 的宾语

exercises.题: She told me ____ she would come tomorrow.
exercises.提示: that 引导宾语从句 (可省略)

exercises.题: Do you know ____ he is from?
I wonder ____ they will win the game.
exercises.提示: whether 引导宾语从句 (是否)

exercises.题: He asked me ____ I liked coffee.
exercises.提示: if 引导宾语从句 (是否)

exercises.题: I don't know ____ he is waiting for.
exercises.提示: who 引导宾语从句作 for 的宾语

exercises.题: Can you tell me ____ the library is?
She said ____ she was reading a book.

items.title: If 条件句（真实 vs 虚拟）
items.rule: 真实条件句主将从现；虚拟语气与事实相反用过去式/would

examples.句: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
examples.翻译: 如果你努力学习，你就会通过考试。

examples.句: If I were rich, I would travel the world.
examples.翻译: 如果我有钱，我就会环游世界。

exercises.题: If it ____ (rain) tomorrow, I will stay at home.
If I ____ (be) a bird, I would fly in the sky.
exercises.提示: 与现在事实相反，用were（即使主语是he也用were）

exercises.题: If he had studied harder, he ____ (would have passed / will pass) the exam.
exercises.提示: 与过去事实相反，从句had done，主句would have done

exercises.题: If I ____ (be) you, I would take the bus.
exercises.提示: 与现在事实相反, be 用 were

exercises.题: If he studies hard, he ____ (pass) the exam.
If I had studied harder, I ____ (pass) the exam.
exercises.提示: 与过去事实相反, 过去完成 / would have done

exercises.题: If you heat water, it ____ (boil).
exercises.提示: 主将从现, 真理性陈述

exercises.题: If she ____ (come), please call me.
We would have won if we ____ (play) better.
exercises.提示: 过去完成时, 与过去相反

exercises.题: If it is fine tomorrow, we ____ (go) hiking.

items.title: 被动语态
items.rule: 主语 + be动词 + 过去分词（by + 执行者）

examples.句: Chinese is spoken by many people.
The letter was written by Tom.

exercises.题: English ____ (speak) in many countries.
exercises.提示: 一般现在时被动：is + 过去分词

exercises.题: The window ____ (break) by Tom yesterday.
exercises.提示: 一般过去时被动：was + 过去分词

exercises.题: The project ____ (complete) now.
exercises.提示: 现在进行时被动：is being + 过去分词

exercises.题: The homework ____ (finish) already.
exercises.提示: 现在完成时被动：has been + 过去分词

exercises.题: A new bridge ____ (build) in our city now.
This book ____ (write) by Lu Xun in 1921.
The cake ____ (make) by my mother every Sunday.
exercises.提示: 一般现在被动, 经常性动作

exercises.题: The thief ____ (catch) by the police last night.
exercises.提示: 不规则动词 catch 过去分词 caught

exercises.题: These machines ____ (make) in China.
exercises.提示: 一般现在被动, 复数

exercises.题: The letter ____ (send) tomorrow morning.

items.title: There be 句型（扩展：时态/就近原则）
items.rule: There is/are + 名词 + 地点；就近原则：be形式由最近名词决定

exercises.题: There ____ a table and two chairs in the room.
exercises.提示: 就近原则：a table是单数，用is

exercises.题: There ____ a concert in the park tomorrow.
There ____ many people at the meeting yesterday.
There have been three ____ (accident) on this road.
exercises.提示: accident可数，there have been后接复数

exercises.题: ____ there any interesting films on TV last night?
exercises.提示: last night是一般过去时，any films是复数，用Were

exercises.题: There is a cat ____ under the table.
There are many books ____ on the shelf.
There ____ (be) a party next Sunday.
There ____ (be) a concert in the park yesterday.
There ____ (be) lots of people waiting in line.
There is no need ____ (worry) about it.
There is a boy ____ (read) in the corner.
There used to ____ (be) a cinema here.

items.en: I am a Grade 7 student.
She is not at school today.
My mother makes breakfast every day.
He is reading a book in the study.
I played football yesterday.
There is a book on the desk.
Can you speak English?
I must finish my homework.
They are playing in the park.
My brother is taller than me.

items.cn: 每周五晚上我都和朋友去看电影。
items.en: I go to the movies with my friends every Friday evening.
Is that book on the shelf?
I did not see her yesterday.
He is running on the playground.
Our school is very big.

items.cn: 如果我们早点出发，就能赶上最后一班地铁。
items.en: If we set off earlier, we can catch the last subway.

items.cn: 尽管他很忙，但他仍然每天坚持锻炼身体。
items.en: Although he is busy, he still exercises every day.

items.cn: 只要我们共同努力，就一定能实现目标。
items.en: As long as we work hard together, we can surely achieve our goal.

items.cn: 无论天气多么恶劣，警察都会坚守岗位。
items.en: No matter how bad the weather is, the police will stay at their posts.

items.cn: 保护环境是我们每个人的责任。
items.en: It is everyone's responsibility to protect the environment.

items.cn: 我宁愿走路也不愿意开车，因为停车太难了。
items.en: I would rather walk than drive because it's too hard to park.

items.cn: 他如此紧张，以至于说不出话来。
items.en: He was so nervous that he couldn't speak.

items.cn: 我们应该养成每天阅读的好习惯。
items.en: We should develop the good habit of reading every day.

items.cn: 这本书被翻译成多种语言。
items.en: The book is translated into many languages.
That bridge was built last year.
The problem is being discussed now.

items.cn: 作业已经被老师批改了。
items.en: The homework has been checked by the teacher.

items.cn: 我相信他会按时完成任务。
items.en: I believe that he will finish the task on time.
I wonder why she is crying.
items.hint: why引导宾语从句，陈述语序

items.cn: 请告诉我会议在哪里举行。
items.en: Please tell me where the meeting will be held.

items.cn: 如果你努力，就一定会成功。
items.en: If you work hard, you will surely succeed.

items.cn: 如果我是一只鸟，我就能飞得更高。
items.en: If I were a bird, I could fly higher.
items.hint: 虚拟语气与现在事实相反

items.cn: 如果有时间，我会来看你。
items.en: If I had time, I would come to see you.
items.hint: 与现在相反的虚拟语气

items.cn: 他是我们班最高的男生。
items.en: He is the tallest boy in our class.
items.hint: 最高级：the + 最高级 + in 范围

items.cn: 这个房间比那个房间大两倍。
items.en: This room is twice as large as that one.

items.cn: 我需要两杯牛奶和三个苹果。
items.en: I need two cups of milk and three apples.
items.hint: 量词 + of + 不可数名词

items.question: By next month, she ____ (finish) the report.
items.hint: 将来完成时：will have + 过去分词

items.question: If I ____ (be) rich, I would travel the world.
items.hint: 虚拟语气（与现在事实相反）

items.question: The book ____ (read) by millions of people.
I wish I ____ (know) the answer.
items.hint: wish后用过去式表不可能实现的愿望

items.question: Not until he arrived home ____ (realize) he lost his keys.
The longer you wait, ____ (little) patience you have.
She speaks English as if she ____ (be) a native speaker.
I would have helped him if he ____ (ask) me.
items.hint: 虚拟语气过去式（与过去事实相反）

items.question: ____ (see) from space, Earth looks like a blue ball.
items.hint: 过去分词作状语（被看作）

items.question: He has lived in Shanghai since he ____ (come) here.
Many trees ____ (plant) in the park every year.
items.hint: 一般现在时被动：are + 过去分词

items.question: The bridge ____ (build) last year. It is now open.
items.hint: 一般过去时被动：was + 过去分词

items.question: A new hospital ____ (build) in our city now.
items.hint: 现在进行时被动：is being + 过去分词

items.question: The work ____ (finish) by the workers already.
items.hint: 现在完成时被动：has been + 过去分词

items.question: I don't know ____ she is waiting for.
items.hint: who引导宾语从句，在从句中作宾语

items.question: He told me that he ____ (leave) the next day.
items.hint: 主句过去时，从句用过去将来时would leave

items.question: I wonder if/whether he ____ (come) tomorrow.
items.hint: 主句现在时，从句时态不变（一般将来时）

items.question: If you heat ice, it ____ (melt).
If I ____ (have) a car, I would drive to work.
items.hint: 与现在事实相反：If + 过去式，would + 动原

items.question: If she had practiced more, she ____ (win).
items.hint: 与过去事实相反：If + had + 过去分词，would have + 过去分词

items.question: This is the ____ (beautiful) painting in the gallery.
items.hint: 多音节词最高级：most + 形容词原级

items.question: He runs ____ (fast) of all the students.
items.hint: 最高级：the + fastest + in/of 范围

items.question: The weather is getting ____ (bad) and ____ (bad).
items.hint: 比较级 + and + 比较级：越来越...

items.title: 一般现在时（第三人称单数）
items.rule: 主语为第三人称单数（he/she/it/单数名词）时,动词末尾加 -s/-es

examples.句: He plays football every day.
She watches TV in the evening.
My mother cooks dinner for us.

exercises.题: She ____ (go) to school by bus.
Tom ____ (have) a pet dog.
My father ____ (read) newspapers every morning.
My cat ____ (drink) milk every morning.
She ____ (wash) her hands before meals.
Tom usually ____ (go) to school by bus.
He ____ (fix) the broken bike himself.
My aunt ____ (teach) us English.
She ____ (do) her homework at 7 every evening.

items.title: 一般疑问句（Do/Does）
items.rule: 一般现在时一般疑问句: Do + 主语 + 动原（Does 用于第三人称单数）

examples.句: Do you like apples?
Does she speak English?
Do they play basketball after school?

exercises.题: ____ your brother like swimming?
exercises.提示: your brother 是第三人称单数,用 Does

exercises.题: ____ they live in Beijing?
— ____ he play piano? — Yes, he does.
____ you like ice cream?
____ they play basketball after school?
____ she speak French?
____ Tom go to school on Sundays?
____ your sister know the answer?
____ you and your friends have lunch at noon?

items.title: 特殊疑问句（What/Where/When/Who/How）
items.rule: 疑问词 + 一般疑问句语序（疑问词 + be/助动词 + 主语 + 动原）

examples.句: What do you do on Sundays?
Where does she live?
How old are you?

exercises.题: ____ is your favourite colour?
____ do you get up every morning?
____ are those boys over there?
____ is your favorite subject at school?
____ does your mother work?
____ do you usually get up in the morning?
____ is the boy in the red T-shirt?
____ old is your younger brother?
____ is the weather like today?
____ color do you like best, red or blue?

items.title: 名词所有格 ('s / of)
items.rule: 表示所属关系: 单数名词 + 's; 复数名词有 s 时只加 '; 无生命事物用 of

examples.句: This is Tom's book.
The boys' classroom is on the second floor.
The cover of the book is red.
examples.翻译: 这本书的封面是红色的。

exercises.题: This is my ____ (sister) bag.
The ____ (children) toys are everywhere.
The colour ____ the sky is blue.
The ____ (boy) name is Tom.
The ____ (children) room is big.
I like the cover ____ the book.
The ____ (teachers) office is on the second floor.
This is the name ____ the new movie.
My ____ (parents) car is blue.

items.title: 可数名词复数（规则变化）
items.rule: 一般加 -s; 以 s/x/ch/sh 结尾加 -es; 以辅音字母 + y 结尾变 y 为 i 加 -es; 以 f/fe 结尾变 f 为 v 加 -es

examples.句: I have three books in my bag.
There are many boxes in the room.
The children are playing in the park.

exercises.题: There are two ____ (baby) in the family.
exercises.提示: baby → babies (y 变 i 加 es)

exercises.题: I bought three ____ (tomato) yesterday.
exercises.提示: tomato 结尾是 o,前有辅音,加 es

exercises.题: The ____ (leaf) on the tree turn yellow in autumn.
exercises.提示: leaf → leaves (f 变 v 加 es)

exercises.题: I have three ____ (box) in my room.
There are five ____ (baby) in the photo.
We saw many ____ (monkey) at the zoo.
She bought two ____ (bottle) of milk.
He has a lot of ____ (key) on his desk.
There are ten ____ (student) in the classroom.
I have two ____ (watch).

items.title: 可数名词复数（不规则变化）
items.rule: 常见不规则复数: man→men, woman→women, child→children, foot→feet, tooth→teeth, mouse→mice

examples.句: There are three children in the park.
Those women are doctors.
My feet hurt after the long walk.

exercises.题: Two ____ (man) are talking under the tree.
The ____ (child) are playing games.
I brush my ____ (tooth) twice a day.
I saw two ____ (mouse) in the kitchen.
He has two ____ (foot) of size.
These ____ (man) are workers.
Those ____ (woman) are teachers.
I lost my ____ (tooth) yesterday.
These are my two ____ (deer).

items.title: 并列连词（and/but/or/so/because）
items.rule: and 表并列,but 表转折,or 表选择,so 表结果,because 表原因

examples.句: I like tea and coffee.
He is young but smart.
I was tired, so I went to bed early.

exercises.题: She is poor ____ she is happy.
Study hard, ____ you will pass the exam.
exercises.提示: or 连接两个相反结果

exercises.题: ____ it was raining, we stayed at home.
I like apples ____ bananas.
He is young ____ he is very clever.
Would you like tea ____ coffee?
It was raining, ____ we stayed home.
I was late ____ I missed the bus.
Hurry up, ____ you'll miss the train.
She is poor ____ happy.

items.title: 形容词比较级（规则变化）
items.rule: 短形容词 + er; 长形容词 more + 原级

examples.句: Tom is taller than Jack.
This book is more interesting than that one.
She runs faster than me.

exercises.题: Today is ____ (warm) than yesterday.
This question is ____ (difficult) than that one.
exercises.提示: 长形容词用 more + 原级

exercises.题: Anna is ____ (busy) than her sister.
exercises.提示: 辅音字母 + y 结尾,变 y 为 i 加 er

exercises.题: Tom is ____ (tall) than his brother.
This book is ____ (cheap) than that one.
She is ____ (busy) than me today.
Today is ____ (hot) than yesterday.
This exercise is ____ (easy) than the last one.
My room is ____ (clean) than yours.
He runs ____ (fast) than his classmates.

items.title: 形容词比较级（不规则变化）
items.rule: good/well → better; bad/badly → worse; many/much → more; little → less; far → farther/further

examples.句: Your English is better than mine.
The weather today is worse than yesterday.
I have more friends than before.

exercises.题: Tom is ____ (good) at math than his brother.
The food is ____ (bad) than before.
There is ____ (little) rain this year than last year.
She is ____ (good) at math than me.
This book is ____ (bad) than that one.
My English is ____ (far) from perfect.
Tom has ____ (many) apples than Jack.
He has ____ (little) time than me.
I feel ____ (bad) today than yesterday.
This restaurant is ____ (good) than that one.

items.title: 形容词最高级
items.rule: 用于三者或以上比较: the + 最高级 (+ 范围 of/in)

examples.句: Tom is the tallest in our class.
Mount Qomolangma is the highest mountain in the world.
examples.翻译: 珠穆朗玛峰是世界上最高的山。

examples.句: This is the most beautiful place I have ever seen.
examples.翻译: 这是我见过的最美的地方。

exercises.题: Anna is ____ (tall) of the three sisters.
exercises.提示: 三者以上用最高级 the tallest

exercises.题: This is ____ (interesting) book I have ever read.
exercises.提示: 长形容词最高级 the most + 原级

exercises.题: He is ____ (good) student in his class.
Mt. Everest is ____ (high) mountain in the world.
She is ____ (tall) girl in her class.
He is ____ (clever) boy in the school.
Today is ____ (hot) day of the year.
She is ____ (beautiful) girl I have ever seen.
He is ____ (good) player on the team.

items.title: 一般将来时（will + 动原）
items.rule: 表示将来发生的动作或状态: 主语 + will + 动原

examples.句: I will visit my grandparents next week.
examples.翻译: 我下周要去看望爷爷奶奶。

examples.句: It will rain tomorrow.
Will you help me with my homework?

exercises.题: I think it ____ (be) sunny tomorrow.
They ____ (travel) to Japan next month.
____ you ____ (come) to my birthday party?
exercises.提示: 一般将来时一般疑问句: Will + 主语 + 动原

exercises.题: She ____ (be) 15 years old next year.
We ____ (have) a picnic next Sunday.
He ____ (come) to the party next Friday.
I think it ____ (snow) tomorrow.
She ____ (call) you when she arrives.

items.title: 一般将来时（be going to + 动原）
items.rule: 表示已经计划好或打算做某事: 主语 + be + going to + 动原

examples.句: I am going to be a doctor.
Look at the clouds. It is going to rain.
We are going to have a picnic this weekend.
examples.翻译: 我们这个周末要去野餐。

exercises.题: She ____ (visit) her aunt this Sunday.
exercises.提示: 第三人称单数用 is going to

exercises.题: They ____ (play) football after school.
What ____ you ____ (do) tomorrow?
exercises.提示: be going to 疑问句把 be 提前

exercises.题: Look at the clouds. It ____ (rain).
I ____ (study) harder from now on.
She ____ (visit) Paris this summer.
We ____ (have) a party next Saturday.
He ____ (fix) his bike this afternoon.
They ____ (move) to Shanghai next month.

items.title: 情态动词 can/could（能力/许可）
items.rule: can + 动原; 表能力 could 是 can 的过去式; 表请求 could 比 can 更委婉

examples.句: I can swim very well.
She could ride a bike when she was five.
examples.翻译: 她五岁时就会骑自行车。

examples.句: Could you please pass me the salt?

exercises.题: He ____ (can) speak three languages.
exercises.提示: 主语是第三人称单数,can 不变

exercises.题: When I was young, I ____ (can) climb trees.
____ you please open the window?
____ you swim when you were five?
____ I borrow your pen, please?
He ____ play the piano very well.
____ you help me with this math problem?
She ____ run faster than any other girl in her class.
I ____ come to your party tonight.

items.title: 情态动词 must/have to（必须）
items.rule: must 表主观必须; have to 表客观需要; must not 禁止; don't have to 不必要

examples.句: You must finish your homework before 9 pm.
examples.翻译: 你必须在晚上9点前完成作业。

examples.句: I have to wear a uniform at school.
You mustn't talk loudly in the library.
examples.翻译: 在图书馆里禁止大声说话。

exercises.题: We ____ (must) wear seat belts in the car.
She ____ (have to) get up early every day.
exercises.提示: 第三人称单数 has to

exercises.题: You ____ (don't have to) come if you are busy.
We ____ wear a uniform at school.
He ____ get up early tomorrow.
exercises.提示: 第三人称单数 has to

exercises.题: I ____ go to the dentist this afternoon.
Drivers ____ stop at red lights.
She ____ take medicine every day.

items.title: 情态动词 should/ought to（应该）
items.rule: should + 动原; 表建议或责任

examples.句: You should see a doctor.
We should protect the environment.
You ought to be more careful.

exercises.题: You ____ (should) drink more water every day.
He ____ (ought to) apologize to her.
____ (should) I bring some food to the party?
You ____ eat more vegetables to stay healthy.
He ____ see a doctor if he feels sick.
You ____ not stay up too late.
We ____ protect the environment.
She ____ apologize for being late.
Students ____ listen to the teacher carefully.
You ____ be more careful next time.

items.title: 感叹句（What/How）
items.rule: What + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词 + 主语 + 谓语; How + 形容词/副词 + 主语 + 谓语

examples.句: What a beautiful day!
How fast he runs!
What an interesting book it is!

exercises.题: ____ (What/How) beautiful flowers they are!
____ (What/How) carefully she works!
exercises.提示: 修饰副词 carefully 用 How

exercises.题: ____ (What/How) a clever boy he is!
exercises.提示: 修饰带 a/an 的名词用 What

exercises.题: ____ beautiful flowers they are!
____ cold it is today!
exercises.提示: How + 形容词 + 主 + be

exercises.题: ____ tall the building is!
____ nice day it is!
____ well she sings!
____ interesting the movie is!
____ clever boy he is!

items.title: 祈使句
items.rule: 动词原形开头,省略主语 You; 否定式: Don't + 动原

examples.句: Open your books, please.
Be quiet!
Don't look out of the window.

exercises.题: ____ (close) the door, please.
exercises.提示: 祈使句以动词原形开头

exercises.题: ____ (not run) in the hallway.
exercises.提示: 否定祈使句用 Don't + 动原

exercises.题: ____ (let) us play together.
____ the door, please. It's cold outside.
____ careful when crossing the road.
____ your hands before meals.
____ run in the hallway.

items.title: 频率副词（always/usually/often/sometimes/never）
items.rule: 频率副词位置: be 动词之后,行为动词之前

examples.句: I am always late for school.
She often reads books in the evening.
He never eats meat.

exercises.题: My father ____ (always) reads newspapers after dinner.
exercises.提示: 频率副词 always 放行为动词前

exercises.题: She is ____ (sometimes) late for class.
exercises.提示: 频率副词放 be 动词后

exercises.题: They ____ (never) go to bed before 10 pm.
He ____ goes to bed before 10 p.m.
She ____ plays the piano in the afternoon.
They ____ visit their grandparents on weekends.
I ____ eat breakfast at 7 every morning.
Tom ____ watches TV in the evening.
My father ____ reads newspapers after dinner.
We ____ go hiking on holidays.

items.title: 现在进行时（特殊疑问句形式）
items.rule: 疑问词 + be + 主语 + 动-ing

examples.句: What are you doing now?
Where is she going?
Who are they waiting for?

exercises.题: What ____ she ____ (read) right now?
exercises.提示: 现在进行时特殊疑问句: 疑问词 + is + 动-ing

exercises.题: Where ____ they ____ (go)?
Who ____ he ____ (talk) to?
exercises.提示: 第三人称单数 is + talking

exercises.题: What ____ you ____ (do) now?
Where ____ your father ____ (work) now?
exercises.提示: 第三人称单数 is working

exercises.题: Who ____ she ____ (talk) to on the phone?
What ____ the children ____ (play) at the moment?
Why ____ you ____ (laugh) now?
Which book ____ he ____ (read) right now?
What ____ Tom ____ (eat) for breakfast now?

items.title: 时间介词（in/on/at）
items.rule: in + 年/月/季节/上午下午晚上; on + 具体日期/星期; at + 钟点/夜晚/中午

examples.句: I was born in 2010.
We have a party on Saturday.
The meeting starts at 8 o'clock.

exercises.题: My birthday is ____ (in/on) May.
We have no class ____ (in/on) Friday afternoon.
He goes to bed ____ (in/at) 9 pm.
I usually get up ____ 6:30 in the morning.
We have a meeting ____ Monday.
She was born ____ 2010.
The shop opens ____ 9 a.m. and closes at 9 p.m.
My birthday is ____ July 15th.
He always reads books ____ the evening.
exercises.提示: 某一段早晨/晚上/下午前用 in

exercises.题: There will be a test ____ next Friday.
We have lunch ____ noon.

items.title: 地点介词（in/on/at/under/over/between/behind）
items.rule: in 在…里; on 在…上(接触); at 在…小地点; under 在…下; over 在…上方; between 在…之间

examples.句: There is a ball under the bed.
The book is on the table.
She is standing between Tom and Jack.
examples.翻译: 她站在汤姆和杰克之间。

exercises.题: The cat is hiding ____ (under/behind) the door.
There is a bridge ____ (over/under) the river.
He lives ____ (in/at) Beijing.
There is a park ____ the school.
The picture hangs ____ the wall.
She lives ____ a small village.
exercises.提示: 在小地方/城镇前用 in

exercises.题: The book is ____ the table.
He is standing ____ his mother.
There is a bridge ____ the river.
The bank is ____ the post office and the library.

items.title: 形容词 vs 副词
items.rule: 形容词修饰名词/作表语; 副词修饰动词/形容词/其他副词,大多以 -ly 结尾

examples.句: She is a careful girl.
She speaks English carefully.
He runs fast.

exercises.题: He is a ____ (slow) runner.
exercises.提示: 修饰名词 runner 用形容词

exercises.题: He runs ____ (slow).
exercises.提示: 修饰动词 runs 用副词 slowly

exercises.题: She is ____ (happy) today.
She sings ____ (beautiful).
He is a ____ (careful) driver.
Tom runs very ____ (fast).
She is ____ (slow) than her sister.
exercises.提示: 修饰 be 动词用形容词

exercises.题: He speaks English ____ (fluent).
She is a ____ (slow) learner.
The rain fell ____ (heavy).

items.title: 反身代词（myself/yourself/himself...）
items.rule: 反身代词 = 形容词性物主代词 + self (复数 selves)

examples.句: I can do it myself.
He hurt himself while playing football.
They enjoyed themselves at the party.
examples.翻译: 他们在聚会上玩得很开心。

exercises.题: Please help ____ (you) to some fish.
The children can dress ____ (they) now.
I taught ____ (I) to play the piano.
I hurt ____ when I fell off the bike.
She taught ____ to play the piano.
He made the dress by ____.
We enjoyed ____ at the party.
They built the house by ____.
You should take care of ____.
The kids can dress ____ now.

items.title: 不定冠词 a/an
items.rule: a 用在辅音音素开头的词前; an 用在元音音素开头的词前

examples.句: She is a teacher.
He is an honest boy.
I have an apple and a banana.
examples.翻译: 我有一个苹果和一根香蕉。

exercises.题: This is ____ (a/an) useful book.
____ (A/An) hour ago, I saw her.
My father is ____ (a/an) engineer.
I bought ____ umbrella yesterday.
There is ____ apple on the table.
He is ____ university student.
She has ____ European friend.
I want to be ____ doctor when I grow up.
We need ____ hour to finish the work.
exercises.提示: hour 元音开头 (h 不发音)

items.title: 定冠词 the
items.rule: the 用于特指、双方都知道的人或物、序数词前、世界上独一无二的事物前

examples.句: The book on the desk is mine.
The sun rises in the east.
She is the first student to arrive.

exercises.题: ____ (A/The) moon is bright tonight.
exercises.提示: 世界上独一无二的事物前用 the

exercises.题: He is ____ (a/the) best player in our team.
I met ____ (a/the) girl at the gate.
exercises.提示: 初次提到某人用不定冠词

exercises.题: ____ sun rises in the east.
exercises.提示: 世界上独一无二的事物

exercises.题: He is ____ best player in our team.
____ United States is in North America.
____ Nile is the longest river in Africa.
____ same boy came to see me yesterday.
____ teacher wants to talk to you.

items.title: 一般过去时（规则动词）
items.rule: 动词过去式: 一般加 -ed; 以 e 结尾加 -d; 辅音字母 + y 变 y 为 i 加 -ed; 重读闭音节双写最后字母加 -ed

examples.句: I played football yesterday.
She watched a movie last night.
He studied English last year.

exercises.题: I ____ (visit) my grandparents last weekend.
She ____ (stop) the car at the traffic light.
exercises.提示: stop 双写 p 加 ed

exercises.题: They ____ (carry) the box to the room.
exercises.提示: carry → carried (y 变 i 加 ed)

exercises.题: I ____ (play) soccer yesterday afternoon.
She ____ (wash) her clothes last night.
They ____ (watch) a movie last weekend.
He ____ (study) English two hours ago.
Tom ____ (cook) dinner for his family.
She ____ (clean) her room this morning.

items.title: 一般过去时（不规则动词）
items.rule: 常见不规则: am/is→was, are→were, go→went, do→did, have→had, eat→ate, see→saw, buy→bought, take→took, make→made, give→gave, come→came

examples.句: I went to the park yesterday.
She had a great time at the party.
examples.翻译: 她在聚会上玩得很开心。

examples.句: He bought a new bike last month.
examples.翻译: 他上个月买了辆新自行车。

exercises.题: We ____ (go) to Beijing last summer.
She ____ (eat) breakfast at 7 am.
They ____ (see) a film last night.
I ____ (go) to the park yesterday.
She ____ (eat) an apple this morning.
They ____ (buy) a new car last month.
He ____ (see) a bird in the tree.
We ____ (have) a great time at the party.
Tom ____ (make) a cake for her birthday.
I ____ (read) an interesting book last week.

items.en: He walks to school every day.
items.hint: 一般现在时第三人称单数 + 频率副词

items.en: I have two sisters.
items.hint: 基数词 two + 名词复数

items.en: She likes playing the piano.
There are three apples on the table.
items.hint: There be 复数 + 地点介词

items.en: They are running in the park.
items.hint: 现在进行时 + 地点介词

items.en: I can speak a little English.
My mother is a nurse.
How is the weather today?
items.hint: How 引导的特殊疑问句

items.en: Don't talk in class.
items.hint: 祈使句否定 Don't + 动原

items.cn: 这件红色的毛衣是谁的?
items.en: Whose red sweater is this?
items.hint: Whose 引导的特殊疑问句

items.en: I brush my teeth twice a day.
items.hint: 频率表达 twice a day

items.en: Can you help me?
There is a computer on the desk.
This book is more interesting than that one.
He is an honest boy.
items.hint: honest 以元音音素开头,用 an

items.cn: 如果你努力学习,就会通过考试。
items.en: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
items.hint: 真实条件句 主将从现

items.cn: 虽然很累,他仍然继续工作。
items.en: Although he was tired, he kept on working.
items.hint: although 引导让步状语从句

items.cn: 他每天都做运动,所以身体很健康。
items.en: He exercises every day, so he is very healthy.

items.cn: 当我到家时,我妈妈正在做饭。
items.en: When I got home, my mother was cooking dinner.
items.hint: 过去进行时 + when 引导时间状语从句

items.cn: 这本书我已经读了三遍。
items.en: I have read this book three times.
items.hint: 现在完成时 + 次数 three times

items.cn: 我打算明年去北京旅行。
items.en: I am going to travel to Beijing next year.

items.cn: 他每天花一小时做作业。
items.en: He spends an hour doing homework every day.

items.cn: 这部电影比那部电影更有趣。
items.en: This film is more interesting than that one.
You should drink eight glasses of water every day.
items.hint: should + 动原 + 数词 + 名词复数

items.en: He had to work overtime yesterday.

items.cn: 如果你昨天早点起床,你就会赶上公共汽车。
items.en: If you had got up earlier yesterday, you would have caught the bus.

items.cn: 他如此聪明,能解决任何难题。
items.en: He is so smart that he can solve any difficult problem.
I don't believe what he said.

items.cn: 这本书已经被翻译成多种语言。
items.en: This book has been translated into many languages.
He said that he would go to Shanghai the next day.
items.hint: 宾语从句 + 过去将来时

items.question: She usually ____ (drink) coffee in the morning.
They ____ (not like) spicy food.
items.hint: 复数否定: do not + 动原

items.question: I ____ (meet) my old friend at the airport yesterday.
items.hint: meet 的过去式是 met (不规则)

items.question: When ____ you ____ (arrive) at the station last night?
items.hint: 过去时疑问句: did + 主语 + 动原

items.question: Look at the dark clouds. It ____ (rain).
By the time you arrive, I ____ (finish) the work.
items.hint: 将来完成时 will have done

items.question: Listen! The birds ____ (sing) in the tree.
items.hint: 现在进行时: are + 动-ing

items.question: He ____ (read) a book at the moment.
items.hint: 第三人称单数 is + 动-ing

items.question: I ____ (sleep) when the phone rang.
items.hint: 过去进行时: was + 动-ing

items.question: While she ____ (cook), the baby cried.
items.hint: 过去进行时 + while 引导

items.question: I ____ (already, finish) my homework.
items.hint: 现在完成时: have + 过去分词

items.question: He ____ (live) here since 2015.
items.hint: since + 时间点用现在完成时

items.question: By the time I got there, he ____ (leave).
items.hint: 过去完成时: had + 过去分词

items.question: She told me that she ____ (visit) Paris twice.
items.hint: 过去的过去,用过去完成时

items.question: English ____ (speak) all over the world.
items.hint: 一般现在时被动: is + 过去分词

items.question: The new bridge ____ (build) last year.
items.hint: 一般过去时被动: was + 过去分词

items.question: The letter ____ (write) by Tom now.
items.hint: 现在进行时被动: is being + 过去分词

items.question: It ____ (rain) for two hours. It is still raining.
items.hint: 现在完成进行时: have been + 动-ing

items.question: The work ____ (must, finish) before 5 pm.
items.hint: 情态动词被动: 情态动词 + be + 过去分词

items.question: He said that he ____ (come) the next day.
items.hint: 主句过去时,从句用过去将来时

items.title: 定语从句 (who/which/that/whose)
items.rule: 定语从句修饰名词或代词,放在先行词后; who 指人,which 指物,that 指人/物,whose 表所属

examples.句: The man who is wearing a hat is my father.
examples.翻译: 戴着帽子的那个人是我爸爸。

examples.句: I like the book which/that you gave me.
examples.翻译: 我喜欢你给我的那本书。

examples.句: The girl whose mother is a doctor studies very hard.
examples.翻译: 那个妈妈是医生的女孩学习很努力。

exercises.题: The boy ____ (who/which) won the race is my brother.
exercises.提示: 先行词 boy 指人,用 who

exercises.题: This is the book ____ (which/who) I bought yesterday.
exercises.提示: 先行词 book 指物,用 which 或 that

exercises.题: The man ____ car was stolen called the police.
The man ____ is wearing a hat is my uncle.
I like the book ____ you gave me.
The girl ____ mother is a doctor sits beside me.
This is the movie ____ I watched yesterday.
The boy ____ lives next door is very friendly.
The car ____ he bought is very expensive.
I know the student ____ passed the exam.

items.title: 状语从句 (when/while/before/after/until)
items.rule: 时间状语从句用 when/while/before/after/until 引导,从句用一般现在时表将来

examples.句: When I came in, he was watching TV.
examples.翻译: 我进来时,他正在看电视。

examples.句: I will call you after I arrive.
examples.翻译: 我到了以后会给你打电话。

examples.句: Wait here until I come back.

exercises.题: I will tell him the news when he ____ (come) back.
exercises.提示: 主将从现: 主句将来时,从句用一般现在时

exercises.题: ____ (While/When) I was sleeping, the phone rang.
exercises.提示: while + 持续性动作,when + 点时间

exercises.题: Don't leave ____ (until/before) I tell you to.
I was reading a book ____ the phone rang.
____ I was walking home, I met Tom.
Wash your hands ____ you eat.
He went to bed ____ he finished his homework.
Wait here ____ I come back.
She was cooking ____ her husband arrived.

items.title: 状语从句 (because/although/so that/if)
items.rule: because 表原因; although/though 表让步; so that 表目的; if 表条件

examples.句: I stayed at home because it was raining.
Although he is poor, he is happy.
Study hard so that you can pass the exam.
examples.翻译: 努力学习,这样你就能通过考试。

exercises.题: ____ (Because/Although) he was ill, he didn't come to school.
____ (Although/Because) it was cold, he went out without a coat.
Speak louder ____ (so that/in case) everyone can hear you.
____ it was raining, we took an umbrella.
____ he is young, he can't drive.
I like summer ____ I can go swimming.
____ he was tired, he went to bed early.
____ she was ill, she didn't go to school.
We left early ____ we wanted to catch the train.

items.title: 主语从句 (what/that/whether)
items.rule: 主语从句作主语,常用 what/that/whether 引导,谓语动词用第三人称单数

examples.句: What he said is true.
Whether he will come is unknown.
That she passed the exam made her mother happy.
examples.翻译: 她通过考试让她妈妈很高兴。

exercises.题: ____ (What/Which) he said is important.
____ (Whether/If) he is coming is not clear.
exercises.提示: 主语从句用 Whether 不用 If

exercises.题: ____ (That/What) the earth moves around the sun is true.
exercises.提示: that 引导陈述句主语从句

exercises.题: ____ he said is true.
____ surprised me was his honesty.
It is clear ____ he is right.
____ he will come is unknown.
____ makes him happy is his family.
It is a fact ____ the earth goes around the sun.
____ she passed the exam is great news.

items.title: 表语从句 (that/whether/what)
items.rule: 表语从句作表语,跟在系动词后

examples.句: The problem is that we don't have enough time.
examples.翻译: 问题是我们没有足够的时间。

examples.句: My idea is whether we should go now.
examples.翻译: 我的想法是我们是否应该现在走。

examples.句: This is what I want to say.

exercises.题: The truth is ____ (that/what) he lied.
exercises.提示: 表语从句陈述事实用 that

exercises.题: The question is ____ (whether/if) he can finish it on time.
exercises.提示: whether 不用 if 在表语从句中也可,但 whether 更正式

exercises.题: That is ____ (what/which) I bought yesterday.

items.title: There be 句型 (进阶:就近原则 + 时态变化)
items.rule: 就近原则: be 动词与最近的主语保持一致; 时态: there is/was/will be/has been

examples.句: There is a book and two pens on the desk.
examples.翻译: 桌子上有一本书和两支钢笔。

examples.句: There were many people in the park yesterday.
There will be a meeting tomorrow.

exercises.题: There ____ (is/are) a pen and two pencils in my bag.
exercises.提示: 就近原则: a pen 单数,用 is

exercises.题: There ____ (is/was) a party last night.
exercises.提示: last night 过去时间,用 was

exercises.题: There ____ (will be/is) a concert next week.
exercises.提示: next week 将来时间,用 will be

items.title: If 真实条件句 (主将从现)
items.rule: If + 一般现在时, 主句 + will + 动原; 表"如果…就…"

examples.句: If it rains tomorrow, I will stay at home.
examples.翻译: 如果明天下雨,我就待在家里。

examples.句: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
examples.翻译: 如果你努力学习,你会通过考试。

examples.句: If he comes, tell him to wait.
examples.翻译: 如果他来了,让他等一下。

exercises.题: If it ____ (rain) tomorrow, we will cancel the trip.
exercises.提示: 主将从现:从句用一般现在时 rains

exercises.题: If she ____ (be) free, she will help us.
If you don't hurry, you ____ (miss) the bus.

items.title: If 虚拟条件句 (与现在/过去事实相反)
items.rule: 与现在相反: If + 过去式, 主句 would + 动原; 与过去相反: If + had done, 主句 would have done

examples.句: If I were you, I would take the job.
examples.翻译: 如果我是你,我会接受这份工作。

examples.句: If I had studied harder, I would have passed.
examples.翻译: 如果我以前更努力学习,我早就通过了。

exercises.题: If he had come earlier, he ____ (meet) her.
exercises.提示: 与过去相反: 主句 would have + 过去分词

exercises.题: If I ____ (have) more money, I would buy a bigger house.
exercises.提示: 与现在相反: 从句用过去式 had

exercises.题: If I ____ (be) a bird, I could fly freely.
exercises.提示: 虚拟现在时 be 用 were

exercises.题: If it ____ (be) Sunday tomorrow, we would go hiking.
exercises.提示: 与将来事实相反用 were

exercises.题: If I ____ (have) wings, I would visit you now.
exercises.提示: 虚拟现在时, 过去式

exercises.题: If she ____ (know) the answer, she would tell us.
exercises.提示: 虚拟现在时动词过去式

exercises.题: If we ____ (be) rich, we would travel the world.
He talks as if he ____ (know) everything.

items.title: 反义疑问句 (前肯定后否定,前否定后肯定)
items.rule: 前肯后否,前否后肯; 时态一致; 人称一致

examples.句: You are a student, aren't you?
He can swim, can't he?
She doesn't like apples, does she?

exercises.题: You are from China, ____ (aren't you/are you)?
He can't drive, ____ (can he/can't he)?
They went there, ____ (didn't they/did they)?

items.title: look 短语动词 (look at/for/after/forward to/like)
items.rule: look at 看; look for 寻找; look after 照顾; look forward to 期待; look like 看起来像

examples.句: Look at the blackboard, please.
I am looking for my keys.
She looks after her little brother.

exercises.题: I'm looking ____ (at/for) my cat. Have you seen it?
My grandma looks ____ (after/for) me when my parents are out.
I look forward ____ (to/--) hearing from you.
exercises.提示: 期待 look forward to + doing/n.

items.title: get/put/take 短语动词
items.rule: get up 起床; get on 上车; get off 下车; put on 穿上; put away 收起来; take off 脱下; take away 拿走

examples.句: I get up at 7 o'clock every morning.
Put on your coat, it's cold outside.
examples.翻译: 穿上你的外套,外面很冷。

examples.句: Please take off your shoes before entering.

exercises.题: I ____ (get up/get on) early yesterday morning.
Don't forget to ____ (put on/put up) your jacket.
The plane ____ (took off/took away) at 8 am.
exercises.提示: 飞机起飞/脱下用 take off

items.title: it 用法 (人称/时间/距离/形式主语/形式宾语)
items.rule: it 指代前文; 表时间/距离/天气; it is + adj + to do (形式主语); find/think it + adj + to do (形式宾语)

examples.句: It is three o'clock now.
It is important to learn English well.
I find it hard to learn math.

exercises.题: ____ (It/This) is sunny today.
I think ____ (it/this) is a good idea.
exercises.提示: think/it/that 从句中 it 作形式宾语可省略

exercises.题: ____ (It/This) took me two hours to finish the work.
exercises.提示: It takes sb. time to do 表花费时间

items.title: 人称代词与物主代词 (主格/宾格/形容词性/名词性)
items.rule: 主格作主语,宾格作宾语; 形容词性物主代词后接名词,名词性物主代词单独使用

examples.句: I like him. He is my friend.
examples.翻译: 我喜欢他。他是我的朋友。

examples.句: This is my book. The book is mine.
examples.翻译: 这是我的书。这本书是我的。

examples.句: She gave him a present. It was hers.
examples.翻译: 她给了他一个礼物。这是她的。

exercises.题: ____ (I/Me) am a student.
This is ____ (my/mine) book.
exercises.提示: 后接名词 book, 用形容词性物主代词 my

exercises.题: The red bike is ____ (her/hers).
exercises.提示: 单独使用, 表"她的(自行车)", 用名词性物主代词 hers

items.title: 指示代词 (this/that/these/those)
items.rule: this/that 指单数,these/those 指复数; this/these 近指,that/those 远指

examples.句: This is my book. That is yours.
These are my friends. Those are his.
examples.翻译: 这些是我的朋友。那些是他的。

exercises.题: ____ (This/These) is a pen.
exercises.提示: a pen 单数, 用 This

exercises.题: ____ (That/Those) are birds in the sky.
exercises.提示: are + 复数, 远指用 Those

exercises.题: ____ (These/This) apples are sweet.
exercises.提示: apples 复数, 近指用 These

items.title: 冠词综合 (a/an/the/零冠词)
items.rule: a/an 表泛指; the 表特指; 零冠词用于复数泛指/不可数/三餐/球类/学科/标题

examples.句: I have a cat. The cat is black.
examples.翻译: 我有一只猫。这只猫是黑色的。

examples.句: We play basketball after school.
He goes to school by bike.

exercises.题: He is ____ (a/an) honest boy.
____ (The/A) sun rises in the east.
exercises.提示: 世界上独一无二的事物前用 the

exercises.题: I have ____ (a/--) breakfast at 7.

items.title: 数词 (基数/序数/分数/日期)
items.rule: 基数表数量,序数表顺序; 分数: 分子基分母序; 日期: 月+序数+年

examples.句: I have three books.
He is the first student to arrive.
Two thirds of the students are girls.
examples.翻译: 三分之二的学生是女生。

exercises.题: There are ____ (five/fifth) people in my family.
Today is May ____ (three/third).
____ (One/First) of the cake is for you.

items.title: 形容词三级 (原级/比较级/最高级) 完整用法
items.rule: as...as 原级比较; 比较级 + than; the + 最高级 + 范围; the more...the more 越…越…

examples.句: Tom is as tall as Jack.
Anna is taller than her sister.
Tom is the tallest of the three.

exercises.题: She is ____ (as tall/taller) as her mother.
This book is ____ (more interesting/most interesting) than that one.
exercises.提示: 两者比较用比较级 more interesting

exercises.题: He is ____ (the fastest/faster) runner in the class.
exercises.提示: 三者以上最高级 the fastest

items.title: 过去将来时 (would / was/were going to)
items.rule: 从过去看将来: 主句过去时 + would + 动原 或 was/were going to + 动原

examples.句: He said he would come tomorrow.
She was going to travel but it rained.
examples.翻译: 她本打算去旅行但下雨了。

exercises.题: He said he ____ (will/would) help me.
exercises.提示: 主句 said 过去,从句用过去将来时 would

exercises.题: I ____ (am going/was going) to call you, but I forgot.
exercises.提示: 过去的打算用 was going to

exercises.题: She told us she ____ (will/would) be back soon.

items.title: 过去完成时 (had + 过去分词)
items.rule: 表示"过去的过去"发生的动作; 标志词 by the time/before/already

examples.句: By the time I arrived, he had left.
examples.翻译: 我到达时,他已经离开了。

examples.句: She had finished her homework before 8 pm.
He had lived there for ten years before he moved.
examples.翻译: 他搬走前已经在那住了10年。

exercises.题: By the time she got there, the train ____ (left/had left).
exercises.提示: "过去的过去"用过去完成时 had left

exercises.题: He said he ____ (already/has already) finished the work.
exercises.提示: said 过去 → 从句 had + 过去分词

exercises.题: When I called him, he ____ (had gone/went) to bed.
exercises.提示: 打电话时他已经睡了, 用过去完成时

items.title: 过去进行时 (was/were + 动-ing)
items.rule: 过去某时刻正在进行的动作; 常与 when/while/at that time 连用

examples.句: I was reading a book at 8 pm yesterday.
While she was cooking, the phone rang.
They were playing football when it began to rain.
examples.翻译: 他们正在踢足球,突然下雨了。

exercises.题: I ____ (was reading/read) a novel when the doorbell rang.
exercises.提示: 过去某时正在进行的动作,用过去进行时 was reading

exercises.题: At 9 pm last night, we ____ (watch/were watching) a movie.
While I ____ (was walking/walked) to school, I met Tom.
exercises.提示: while + 持续性动作, 用过去进行时

items.title: 五大基本句型 (SV/SVO/SVOO/SVOC/SVP)
items.rule: SV 主谓; SVO 主谓宾; SVOO 主谓间宾直宾; SVOC 主谓宾宾补; SVP 主系表

examples.句: Birds fly.
I love music.
She is beautiful.

exercises.题: "Time flies." 是 ____ (SV/SVO) 句型.
exercises.提示: Time(主) flies(谓), 没有宾语, 是 SV

exercises.题: "He gave me a book." 是 ____ (SVO/SVOO) 句型.
exercises.提示: He(主) gave(谓) me(间宾) a book(直宾)

exercises.题: "She looks happy." 是 ____ (SVO/SVP) 句型.
exercises.提示: looks 是系动词, happy 是表语, SVP

items.title: 被动语态 (be + 过去分词)
items.rule: 主语是动作承受者; be 动词随主语时态/人称变化

examples.句: English is spoken all over the world.
The window was broken by Tom.
The work has been finished already.

exercises.题: This song ____ (is sung/sings) by many people.
exercises.提示: 一般现在时被动 is + sung

exercises.题: The letter ____ (was written/is written) by him yesterday.
A new hospital ____ (is being built/has built) now.
exercises.提示: now 现在进行时被动 is being built

items.title: 感叹句 (What/How 全套用法)
items.rule: What + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词 + 主语 + 谓语; How + 形容词/副词 + 主语 + 谓语

examples.句: What a beautiful flower!
How beautiful the flower is!
What kind students they are!
examples.翻译: 他们是多么善良的学生啊!

exercises.题: ____ (What/How) a nice day it is!
exercises.提示: 修饰带 a/an 的名词用 What

exercises.题: ____ (What/How) hard he works!
exercises.提示: 修饰副词 hard 用 How

exercises.题: ____ (What/How) clever the boy is!

items.title: 并列连词与从属连词 (and/but/or/so/because/when/if/although)
items.rule: 并列: and/but/or/so; 从属: when/because/if/although/that

examples.句: I was hungry, so I ate a sandwich.
examples.翻译: 我饿了,所以吃了个三明治。

examples.句: He likes math but he doesn't like English.
examples.翻译: 他喜欢数学但不喜欢英语。

examples.句: I will go if it doesn't rain.

exercises.题: He is rich, ____ (and/but) he is not happy.
Stay here ____ (until/while) I come back.
____ (Because/So) he was ill, he didn't go to school.
exercises.提示: 原因状语用 Because 开头, 不用 So(So 是并列连词)

items.title: 副词 (频率/程度/方式副词)
items.rule: 频率副词: always/usually/often/sometimes/never; 程度副词: very/quite/rather/extremely; 方式副词多由 adj+ly

examples.句: She always gets up early.
He runs very fast.
She sings beautifully.

exercises.题: I ____ (always/often) go to bed at 10 pm.
He is ____ (very/quite) tall.
exercises.提示: 程度副词修饰形容词 tall

exercises.题: She speaks English ____ (fluent/fluently).
exercises.提示: 修饰动词 speaks 用副词 fluently

items.title: 间接引语 (宾语从句, 时态退一格)
items.rule: 直接引语 → 间接引语: 人称/时态/时间状语相应变化; 主从时态一致

examples.句: He said, "I am tired." → He said he was tired.
She said, "I will come." → She said she would come.

exercises.题: He said, "I am happy." → He said he ____ (is/was) happy.
She said, "I will go." → She said she ____ (will/would) go.
Tom said, "I like it." → Tom said he ____ (likes/liked) it.
exercises.提示: 现在时 → 过去时 liked

items.title: 介词综合 (in/on/at 时间 + in/on/at 地点)
items.rule: in 年月季节上午下午晚上; on 日期星期; at 钟点; in 城市大国; at 小地点

examples.句: I was born in 2008.
The meeting is on Monday.
He lives at 25 Park Street.

exercises.题: School starts ____ (in/on) September.
We have lunch ____ (at/in) 12 o'clock.
He arrived ____ (in/at) Beijing yesterday.
He will arrive ____ 5 o'clock ____ the morning.
exercises.提示: 钟点 + 早午晚, 前者用 at

exercises.题: She was born ____ a small town ____ 1995.
exercises.提示: 城镇 + 年份都可用 in

exercises.题: We will meet ____ the park ____ Sunday afternoon.
There is a lamp ____ the desk.
He started working ____ the age of 18.
The meeting is ____ 3 p.m. ____ Tuesday.
I will be there ____ half past eight.
She left ____ a cold morning ____ December.

items.cn: 我喜欢那位正在唱歌的女孩。
items.en: I like the girl who is singing.
items.hint: who 引导定语从句修饰 girl

items.cn: 这是我昨天买的那本书。
items.en: This is the book that I bought yesterday.
items.hint: which/that 引导定语从句修饰 book

items.cn: 我喜欢那个窗户朝南的房间。
items.en: I like the room whose window faces south.

items.cn: 那位戴眼镜的女士是我的老师。
items.en: The woman who wears glasses is my teacher.

items.cn: 这是我们去年参观的博物馆。
items.en: This is the museum that we visited last year.

items.cn: 当老师进来时,学生们正在读书。
items.en: When the teacher came in, the students were reading.
items.hint: when 引导时间状语从句

items.cn: 因为下雨,我们待在家里。
items.en: Because it was raining, we stayed at home.
items.hint: because 引导原因状语从句

items.cn: 如果你努力学习,你会成功。
items.en: If you study hard, you will succeed.
items.hint: if 真实条件句 主将从现

items.cn: 虽然他很累,但他继续工作。
items.en: Although he was tired, he kept on working.
items.hint: although 引导让步状语从句

items.cn: 他说话很大声,以至于后排都能听见。
items.en: He spoke so loudly that the back row could hear him.

items.cn: 这本书被翻译成了多种语言。
items.en: This book has been translated into many languages.
This bridge was built last year.
These problems are being discussed.
English is spoken all over the world.
This song is sung as a Chinese folk song.

items.cn: 如果我是你,我就会接受那份工作。
items.en: If I were you, I would take the job.

items.cn: 如果我昨天早点起床,我就会赶上公共汽车。
items.en: If I had got up earlier yesterday, I would have caught the bus.
If only I could fly.
I was born in 2010.

items.cn: 会议在周一上午 9 点开始。
items.en: The meeting starts at 9 am on Monday.
items.hint: at + 钟点 + on + 星期

items.en: He lives in Beijing.
The library is in front of the school.

items.cn: 他在桌子底下找到了一只猫。
items.en: He found a cat under the table.
Tom is taller than Jack.
Today is hotter than yesterday.

items.cn: 这本书比那本书有趣得多。
items.en: This book is much more interesting than that one.

items.cn: 他跑得和他哥哥一样快。
items.en: He runs as fast as his brother.
She is the tallest girl in our class.
What is your name?
What time is it now?
Excuse me, where is the restroom?
items.hint: Excuse me 表打扰, where 问地点

items.en: I ride my bike to school every day.
What sport do you like?
items.hint: What + 名词 + 一般疑问句

items.cn: 这个周末你打算做什么?
items.en: What are you going to do this weekend?

items.cn: 你已经看完那本书了吗?
items.en: Have you finished reading that book yet?
I have lived here for ten years.
items.hint: 现在完成时 + for + 时间段

items.cn: 昨天这个时候我在写作业。
items.en: I was doing my homework at this time yesterday.

items.cn: 我想知道明天的天气怎么样。
items.en: I wonder what the weather will be like tomorrow.
items.hint: 宾语从句 what...will be like

items.cn: 他对我说他明天会去上海。
items.en: He told me that he would go to Shanghai tomorrow.
items.hint: 间接引语 时态退一格

items.cn: 这正是我一直想要的书。
items.en: This is the book that I have been looking for.
items.hint: 定语从句 + 现在完成进行时

items.question: The earth ____ (move) around the sun.
items.hint: 客观真理用一般现在时第三人称单数 moves

items.question: My father ____ (drink) tea every morning.
Water ____ (freeze) at 0°C.
I ____ (buy) a new bike last week.
She ____ (write) a letter to her friend yesterday.
They ____ (have) a party last Saturday.
We ____ (visit) our grandparents next weekend.
items.hint: next weekend 将来 → will + 动原

items.question: I ____ (be) a doctor in the future.
items.hint: in the future → will + be 原形

items.question: Listen! She ____ (sing) in the next room.
Don't disturb him. He ____ (sleep).
What ____ you ____ (do) right now?
items.hint: 现在进行时疑问句: are + doing

items.question: At 9 pm yesterday, I ____ (watch) TV.
items.hint: 过去某时正在做 → 过去进行时 was + 动-ing

items.question: While she ____ (read), the bell rang.
items.hint: while + 持续动作 → 过去进行时

items.question: When I called, they ____ (play) basketball.
He ____ (live) here since 2010.
items.hint: since + 时间点 → 现在完成时

items.question: I ____ (never, see) such a beautiful sunset.
items.hint: never 提示现在完成时 have + never + 过去分词

items.question: By the time I arrived, he ____ (leave).
items.hint: "过去的过去" → 过去完成时 had + 过去分词

items.question: She told me she ____ (already, eat) lunch.
items.hint: told 过去 → 从句 had + 过去分词

items.question: After he ____ (finish) his work, he went home.
items.hint: "过去的过去" → had + 过去分词

items.question: He said he ____ (come) the next day.
items.hint: said 过去 → 从句 would + 动原

items.question: She told us she ____ (visit) her aunt the following week.
items.hint: 过去将来时 would + 动原

items.question: I didn't know if he ____ (arrive) on time.
items.hint: 过去将来时 would + 动原

items.question: I ____ (wait) for you for an hour.
items.hint: for + 时间段 + 持续动作 → 现在完成进行时

items.question: By next year, I ____ (study) here for 5 years.
items.hint: 将来完成时 will have + 过去分词

items.question: By the time you arrive, dinner ____ (be) ready.
items.hint: 将来完成时 will have + been

items.question: Many trees ____ (plant) in our city every year.
items.hint: 一般现在时被动 are + 过去分词

items.question: The homework ____ (must, finish) before 9 pm.
items.hint: 情态动词被动: 情态动词 + be + 过去分词

items.title: 名词专项巩固
items.rule: 掌握可数与不可数名词、单复数、所有格及集合名词的谓语一致。

exercises.题: There are three ____ (box) under the desk.
exercises.提示: box 以 x 结尾，复数加 es

exercises.题: We need two ____ (piece) of paper.
These are the ____ (child) books.
How much ____ (water) is left?
The police ____ (be) looking for the lost boy.
Two ____ (woman) doctors work here.
exercises.提示: 作定语的 man/woman 随中心词变复数

items.title: 代词专项巩固
items.rule: 根据句子成分选择人称、物主、反身、指示、疑问或不定代词。

exercises.题: Lucy is my friend. ____ is kind.
exercises.提示: 作主语用人称代词主格

exercises.题: Please give the book to ____ (I).
This pen is not mine. It is ____ (he).
exercises.提示: 单独作表语用名词性物主代词

exercises.题: The children made the cards by ____ (they).
I have two bags. One is blue and ____ is black.
exercises.提示: 两者中的另一个用 the other

exercises.题: Is there ____ in the classroom?
exercises.提示: 疑问句中表示任何人用 anyone

items.title: 冠词专项巩固
items.rule: 首次泛指用 a/an，特指用 the；三餐、球类等固定场景用零冠词。

exercises.题: She is ____ honest student.
I saw a dog. ____ dog was very friendly.
The sun rises in ____ east.
He can play ____ violin.
We usually have ____ breakfast at seven. (填 no article)
My uncle is ____ university teacher.
exercises.提示: university 以辅音音素 /j/ 开头

items.title: 数词专项巩固
items.rule: 区分基数词、序数词、分数、日期和大数的表达。

exercises.题: September is the ____ (nine) month of the year.
There are ____ (twelve) months in a year.
About two ____ (thousand) students study here.
exercises.提示: 具体数字后 thousand 不加 s

exercises.题: One third plus one third is ____ thirds.
Today is her ____ (twenty) birthday.
The room is on the ____ (five) floor.

items.title: 介词专项巩固
items.rule: 根据时间、地点、方向及固定搭配选择恰当介词。

exercises.题: The meeting starts ____ eight o'clock.
We have a sports meeting ____ October.
The picture is ____ the wall.
exercises.提示: 物体附着在表面用 on

exercises.题: She walked ____ the room and sat down.
The river runs ____ the bridge.
This present is ____ my best friend.
She always arrives ____ school early.
I will meet you ____ the bus stop.
He went to Beijing ____ plane last week.
We often talk ____ the phone.
exercises.提示: on the phone 固定搭配

exercises.题: She is good ____ playing the piano.
exercises.提示: be good at 表示擅长

exercises.题: I'm afraid ____ dogs.
exercises.提示: be afraid of 固定搭配

exercises.题: He is interested ____ science.
exercises.提示: be interested in 固定搭配

exercises.题: The meeting will start ____ 8 o'clock sharp.

items.title: 连词专项巩固
items.rule: 并列连词连接同等成分，从属连词引导状语从句。

exercises.题: Hurry up, ____ you will miss the bus.
I was tired, ____ I finished the work.
He stayed home ____ he was ill.
____ it was raining, they kept playing.
Call me ____ you arrive at the station.
You can take the bus ____ walk there.

items.title: 形容词与副词专项巩固
items.rule: 形容词修饰名词或作表语，副词修饰动词、形容词或整句。

exercises.题: The soup smells ____ (good).
exercises.提示: 系动词后用形容词作表语

exercises.题: Please speak ____ (slow).
exercises.提示: 修饰动词 speak 用副词

exercises.题: The boy is ____ enough to carry the box.
She finished the test ____ (careful).
Something ____ happened yesterday.
exercises.提示: 形容词修饰不定代词时后置

exercises.题: The train arrived ____ (late).
exercises.提示: late 既可作形容词也可作副词

items.title: 动词专项巩固
items.rule: 区分行为动词、系动词和助动词，并注意主谓一致。

exercises.题: The flowers ____ (look) beautiful in spring.
She ____ (have) a new dictionary.
exercises.提示: have 的三单形式是 has

exercises.题: ____ he like science?
exercises.提示: 一般现在时三单疑问用 does

exercises.题: The idea ____ (sound) interesting.
exercises.提示: sound 作系动词且主语单数

exercises.题: They ____ (not do) their homework yesterday.
My brother ____ (become) a doctor last year.

items.title: 情态动词专项巩固
items.rule: 情态动词后接动词原形，按能力、许可、义务和建议选择。

exercises.题: You ____ wear a seat belt in a car.
____ I borrow your ruler?
You ____ drink more water when you have a fever.
Tom ____ swim when he was five.
You ____ park here. It is forbidden.
We ____ finish today; tomorrow is also fine.

items.title: 一般现在时专项巩固
items.rule: 表示习惯、状态或客观事实；第三人称单数动词加 -s/-es。

exercises.题: My sister ____ (study) English every evening.
exercises.提示: 第三人称单数 study 变 studies

exercises.题: The earth ____ (go) around the sun.
exercises.提示: 客观事实用一般现在时

exercises.题: We ____ (not watch) TV on school nights.
____ your father ____ (drive) to work?
exercises.提示: 三单疑问用 does + 动词原形

exercises.题: Jenny often ____ (wash) the dishes.
There ____ (be) some milk in the glass.

items.title: 一般过去时专项巩固
items.rule: 表示过去完成的动作或状态，使用动词过去式。

exercises.题: We ____ (visit) the museum last Sunday.
exercises.提示: last Sunday 用一般过去时

exercises.题: Amy ____ (take) many photos yesterday.
They ____ (not go) camping because it rained.
exercises.提示: 过去时否定用 didn't + 动词原形

exercises.题: ____ you ____ (see) the film last week?
The match ____ (begin) at three yesterday.
I ____ (be) at home two hours ago.
exercises.提示: I 的过去式 be 动词用 was

items.title: 一般将来时专项巩固
items.rule: will 表示将来或临时决定，be going to 表示计划或有迹象的预测。

exercises.题: I ____ (call) you after school tomorrow.
We ____ (have) a picnic this weekend; everything is ready.
exercises.提示: 已有计划用 be going to

exercises.题: There ____ (be) a meeting next Monday.
exercises.提示: There be 的将来式为 There will be

exercises.题: ____ she ____ (join) us tonight?
exercises.提示: will 提到主语前构成疑问

exercises.题: Look at those clouds! It ____ (snow).
exercises.提示: 有明显迹象的预测用 be going to

exercises.题: I think people ____ (live) on Mars one day.

items.title: 现在进行时专项巩固
items.rule: am/is/are + 动词-ing，表示此刻或现阶段正在进行。

exercises.题: Be quiet! The baby ____ (sleep).
exercises.提示: 此刻正在发生用现在进行时

exercises.题: We ____ (prepare) for the school festival now.
exercises.提示: now 是现在进行时标志

exercises.题: What ____ Tom ____ (do) at the moment?
I ____ (write) an email right now.
The children ____ (not play) outside now.
Look! A bus ____ (come).

items.title: 过去进行时专项巩固
items.rule: was/were + 动词-ing，表示过去某时正在进行。

exercises.题: At eight last night, I ____ (read) a novel.
exercises.提示: 过去具体时刻正在进行

exercises.题: They ____ (play) chess when I entered.
exercises.提示: 过去背景动作用过去进行时

exercises.题: While Mum ____ (cook), Dad was setting the table.
What ____ you ____ (do) at this time yesterday?
It ____ (rain) heavily when school ended.
The students ____ (not listen) when the teacher asked the question.

items.title: 现在完成时专项巩固
items.rule: have/has + 过去分词，连接过去动作与现在结果或持续状态。

exercises.题: I ____ just ____ (finish) my lunch.
She ____ (know) him for five years.
____ you ever ____ (visit) Xi'an?
exercises.提示: 询问经历用现在完成时

exercises.题: The train ____ already ____ (leave).
We ____ (not receive) his reply yet.
exercises.提示: 否定句中 yet 常用完成时

exercises.题: My family ____ (live) here since 2018.

items.title: 过去完成时专项巩固
items.rule: had + 过去分词，表示在另一过去动作之前已经完成。

exercises.题: By six o'clock, they ____ (finish) the project.
exercises.提示: by + 过去时间用过去完成时

exercises.题: The film ____ already ____ (start) when we arrived.
exercises.提示: 先发生的过去动作用 had done

exercises.题: She realized that she ____ (leave) her key at home.
exercises.提示: 忘钥匙发生在意识到之前

exercises.题: After he ____ (pack) his bag, he left.
I ____ never ____ (see) snow before that winter.
exercises.提示: before that winter 表示过去的过去

exercises.题: Had they ____ (meet) before the party?

items.title: 过去将来时专项巩固
items.rule: would + 动词原形或 was/were going to，表示从过去看将来。

exercises.题: He said he ____ (help) me the next day.
I knew the train ____ (arrive) soon.
She told us she ____ (move) the following month.
exercises.提示: the following month 对应过去将来

exercises.题: They were sure the plan ____ (work).
exercises.提示: 过去判断中的将来结果

exercises.题: We didn't know whether it ____ (rain) later.
exercises.提示: 过去时中的 later 用 would

exercises.题: Tom said he ____ (not be) late again.

items.title: 宾语从句专项巩固
items.rule: 引导词 + 陈述语序；主句为过去时时注意时态呼应。

exercises.题: Could you tell me where the library ____ (be)?
I don't know whether he ____ (come) today.
She said that she ____ (be) tired.
exercises.提示: 主句过去时注意时态呼应

exercises.题: Do you know what Tom ____ (want)?
The teacher asked why I ____ (be) late.
exercises.提示: 转述过去提问用陈述语序

exercises.题: I believe that our team ____ (win) the match.

items.title: 定语从句专项巩固
items.rule: 关系代词 who/which/that/whose 指代先行词并在从句中充当成分。

exercises.题: The girl ____ is reading is my cousin.
exercises.提示: 先行词是人且作主语用 who

exercises.题: This is the bike ____ my father bought.
I know a boy ____ mother is a doctor.
The book ____ is on the desk is mine.
exercises.提示: 先行词是物且作主语用 which

exercises.题: The teacher ____ helped me is very patient.
This is the best film ____ I have seen.
exercises.提示: 先行词被最高级修饰常用 that

items.title: 状语从句专项巩固
items.rule: 用 when、because、although、if、so that 等表达时间、原因、让步、条件和目的。

exercises.题: I will call you ____ I get home.
We stayed inside ____ the wind was strong.
____ he is young, he is very responsible.
Speak clearly ____ everyone can hear you.
exercises.提示: 目的状语从句用 so that

exercises.题: You won't improve ____ you practise regularly.
She was ____ tired that she fell asleep at once.
exercises.提示: so...that 引导结果状语从句

items.title: 主语从句专项巩固
items.rule: what/that/whether 等引导的从句整体在句中作主语。

exercises.题: ____ he said surprised everyone.
exercises.提示: what 在从句中作宾语并引导主语从句

exercises.题: ____ we need is more time.
exercises.提示: what 引导的从句整体作主语

exercises.题: ____ she will join us is still unknown.
____ the earth moves around the sun is a fact.
exercises.提示: 陈述事实用 that 引导

exercises.题: ____ will lead the team has not been decided.
exercises.提示: who 在主语从句中作主语

exercises.题: ____ you choose depends on your needs.
exercises.提示: what 表示所选择的事物

items.title: 表语从句专项巩固
items.rule: 从句位于系动词之后，用来说明主语的内容或状态。

exercises.题: The problem is ____ we are short of time.
exercises.提示: that 引导表语从句说明问题

exercises.题: The question is ____ we should start now.
This is ____ I need your help.
My hope is ____ everyone can stay healthy.
The point is ____ we can solve the problem.
The result was ____ we had expected.

items.title: 五大基本句型专项巩固
items.rule: 识别 SV、SVO、SVP、SVOO 和 SVOC 五种基本结构。

exercises.题: Birds fly. This sentence is the ____ pattern.
exercises.提示: Birds 是主语，fly 是谓语

exercises.题: I enjoy music. This sentence is the ____ pattern.
The soup tastes good. This sentence is the ____ pattern.
exercises.提示: tastes 是系动词，good 是表语

exercises.题: Mum bought me a coat. This sentence is the ____ pattern.
exercises.提示: me 和 a coat 是双宾语

exercises.题: We call him Jack. This sentence is the ____ pattern.
The baby smiled. This sentence is the ____ pattern.

items.title: There be 句型专项巩固
items.rule: There + be + 名词 + 地点/时间；be 动词遵循就近原则。

exercises.题: There ____ a pen and two books on the desk.
exercises.提示: 就近主语 a pen 是单数

exercises.题: There ____ many trees here ten years ago.
There ____ be a concert tomorrow.
exercises.提示: 将来式为 There will be

exercises.题: ____ there any juice in the bottle?
exercises.提示: juice 不可数，be 用 is

exercises.题: There ____ not enough chairs for everyone.
There ____ been great changes in our town.
exercises.提示: changes 是复数，完成式用 have been

items.title: If 条件句专项巩固
items.rule: 真实条件句遵循主将从现；与现在事实相反时用虚拟条件形式。

exercises.题: If it ____ (rain) tomorrow, we will stay home.
You will improve if you ____ (practise) every day.
exercises.提示: if 从句用一般现在时

exercises.题: If I ____ (be) you, I would apologise.
exercises.提示: 与现在事实相反用 were

exercises.题: If she had time, she ____ (join) us.
exercises.提示: 虚拟主句用 would + 动词原形

exercises.题: If you heat water to 100°C, it ____ (boil).
exercises.提示: 客观规律两边都用一般现在时

exercises.题: Unless you ____ (leave) now, you will be late.

items.title: 被动语态专项巩固
items.rule: be + 过去分词，be 随时态和主语变化。

exercises.题: English ____ (use) in many countries.
exercises.提示: 一般现在时被动为 am/is/are + done

exercises.题: The window ____ (break) yesterday.
exercises.提示: 一般过去时被动为 was/were + done

exercises.题: The work ____ (finish) already.
These trees ____ (plant) next spring.
The classroom must ____ (clean) every day.
exercises.提示: 情态动词被动为 modal + be + done

exercises.题: A new road ____ (build) now.

items.title: 感叹句专项巩固
items.rule: What 修饰名词短语，How 修饰形容词或副词。

exercises.题: ____ a beautiful garden it is!
exercises.提示: 中心词是可数名词 garden

exercises.题: ____ carefully she writes!
____ interesting books they are!
____ cold the water is!
____ an exciting match we watched!
exercises.提示: 可数名词短语用 What an

exercises.题: ____ fast the train runs!
exercises.提示: 副词 fast 前用 How

items.title: 祈使句专项巩固
items.rule: 用动词原形开头；否定式为 Don't + 动词原形。

exercises.题: ____ (turn) off the light before you leave.
exercises.提示: 肯定祈使句用动词原形开头

exercises.题: Please ____ (keep) the classroom clean.
____ (be) careful when crossing the street.
exercises.提示: be 动词祈使句用 Be 开头

exercises.题: Let's ____ (take) a short break.
Never ____ (give) up your dream.
exercises.提示: Never 开头的祈使句后用动词原形

items.title: 比较结构专项巩固
items.rule: 正确使用比较级、最高级、as...as 及倍数比较。

exercises.题: This river is ____ (wide) than that one.
Math is as ____ (important) as English.
Lucy is the ____ (careful) student in her group.
The more you read, the ____ (much) you learn.
My bag is not as ____ (heavy) as yours.
This hall is twice as ____ (large) as that room.
exercises.提示: 倍数 + as + 原级 + as

items.title: 短语动词专项巩固
items.rule: 结合语境辨析 look、get、put、take 等动词短语。

exercises.题: Please ____ the word in a dictionary.
My aunt will ____ my cat while I am away.
Please ____ your shoes before entering.
The plane will ____ in ten minutes.
exercises.提示: 飞机起飞也用 take off

exercises.题: Don't ____ the meeting until tomorrow.
We should ____ the used bottles for recycling.

items.title: 常用短语专项巩固
items.rule: 掌握初中常见介词短语和固定搭配的完整形式。

exercises.题: The bus stop is ____ front of the bank.
exercises.提示: in front of 表示在外部前面

exercises.题: We arrived at school ____ time.
She is good ____ drawing.
exercises.提示: be good at 表示擅长

exercises.题: Please finish the work as soon ____ possible.
He went to school instead ____ staying home.
exercises.提示: instead of 后接名词或动名词

exercises.题: The students took part ____ the clean-up activity.
exercises.提示: take part in 表示参加

items.title: 反义疑问句专项巩固
items.rule: 前肯后否、前否后肯，附加问句的人称和助动词与陈述句一致。

exercises.题: Tom is a student, ____ he?
They don't live here, ____ they?
Mary went home early, ____ she?
Let's go for a walk, ____ we?
exercises.提示: Let's 的附加问句用 shall we

exercises.题: Open the window, ____ you?
Nobody called me, ____ they?
exercises.提示: nobody 含否定意义，后用肯定

items.title: 间接引语专项巩固
items.rule: 转述时调整人称、时间状语和必要的时态。

exercises.题: Tom said, 'I am busy.' Tom said that he ____ busy.
exercises.提示: 转述时 am 变 was

exercises.题: She said, 'I will call you.' She said she ____ call me.
Mum asked me, 'Are you tired?' Mum asked if I ____ tired.
exercises.提示: 一般疑问句用 if 并改陈述语序

exercises.题: He asked, 'Where do you live?' He asked where I ____.
exercises.提示: 特殊疑问词保留，语序改为陈述语序

exercises.题: The teacher said, 'The earth is round.' The teacher said the earth ____ round.
Dad told me, 'Don't be late.' Dad told me ____ be late.
exercises.提示: 否定祈使句转述为 not to do

items.title: it 用法专项巩固
items.rule: it 可指代事物、天气时间距离，也可作形式主语或形式宾语。

exercises.题: ____ is raining heavily outside.
____ is ten kilometres from here to the station.
I find ____ useful to keep a diary.
____ is important for us to exercise.
What time is ____ now?
I bought a new watch. ____ works well.

items.title: 一般疑问句专项巩固
items.rule: 把 be、情态动词或助动词移到主语之前，并用升调提问。

exercises.题: ____ you like reading?
exercises.提示: 一般现在时复数/第二人称用 Do

exercises.题: ____ she at home now?
____ they visit the museum yesterday?
____ Tom play the guitar?
____ your brother finished his homework?
exercises.提示: 现在完成时把 has 提前

exercises.题: ____ there any students in the lab?
exercises.提示: There be 疑问句把 be 提前

items.title: 特殊疑问句专项巩固
items.rule: 疑问词 + 一般疑问句语序；疑问词作主语时直接接谓语。

exercises.题: ____ do you go to school? By bus.
____ book is this? It is Lily's.
____ did the meeting start? At nine.
____ are you going? To the library.
____ students are there in your class?
exercises.提示: 询问可数数量用 How many

exercises.题: ____ broke the window?
exercises.提示: 疑问词作主语时直接接谓语

items.cn: 我每天早晨读十分钟英语。
items.en: I read English for ten minutes every morning.
items.hint: every morning 用一般现在时

items.en: My sister usually gets up at seven.

items.cn: 我们周末经常帮助父母。
items.en: We often help our parents at weekends.
items.hint: 频率副词放在实义动词前

items.en: The sun rises in the east.
items.hint: 客观事实用一般现在时

items.en: Tom does not like sweet food.
Do you exercise every day?
She is packing her schoolbag now.

items.cn: 孩子们正在操场上跳绳。
items.en: The children are skipping rope on the playground.
Please be quiet because Grandpa is sleeping.
items.hint: 正在发生用现在进行时

items.cn: 我昨晚完成了科学作业。
items.en: I finished my science homework last night.
items.hint: last night 用一般过去时

items.cn: 她上周参观了历史博物馆。
items.en: She visited the history museum last week.
items.hint: last week 用一般过去时

items.en: We did not play football yesterday.
items.hint: 过去时否定用 did not

items.en: I will call you tomorrow.

items.cn: 我们这个周末打算野餐。
items.en: We are going to have a picnic this weekend.
There are four windows in the classroom.
items.hint: 复数名词前用 There are

items.en: There is no milk in the fridge.
There is a chair beside the desk.
Can you ride a bike?
We must follow the school rules.
You should go to bed early.

items.cn: 不要在图书馆里大声说话。
items.en: Do not speak loudly in the library.
items.hint: 否定祈使句用 Do not

items.en: Please open the window.
What a beautiful picture it is!
items.hint: What + a + 形容词 + 名词

items.en: How clever the little dog is!

items.cn: 那把蓝色的雨伞是我的。
items.en: That blue umbrella is mine.
items.hint: mine 是名词性物主代词

items.en: Whose photos are these?

items.cn: 会议在星期二下午举行。
items.en: The meeting is on Tuesday afternoon.

items.cn: 我家在超市和银行之间。
items.en: My home is between the supermarket and the bank.

items.cn: 她是我们班第三高的学生。
items.en: She is the third tallest student in our class.
There are two cups of tea on the table.
items.hint: 不可数名词用量词表达

items.cn: 我们每天轮流打扫教室。
items.en: We take turns cleaning the classroom every day.

items.cn: 他从不把脏衣服放在床上。
items.en: He never puts dirty clothes on the bed.

items.cn: 我最喜欢的科目是地理。
items.en: My favourite subject is geography.

items.cn: 他们每个月去一次科技馆。
items.en: They visit the science museum once a month.
items.hint: 频率表达 once a month

items.cn: 我昨天借了两本故事书。
items.en: I borrowed two storybooks yesterday.
We will have a class meeting next week.
items.hint: next week 用一般将来时

items.en: Please look both ways before crossing the road.
Which piece of cake would you like?

items.cn: 我到家时，爸爸正在修自行车。
items.en: Dad was repairing the bike when I got home.

items.cn: 昨晚八点我们正在看新闻。
items.en: We were watching the news at eight last night.
items.hint: 过去具体时刻用过去进行时

items.cn: 老师进来时，他们正在讨论问题。
items.en: They were discussing the problem when the teacher came in.
items.hint: 背景动作用过去进行时

items.cn: 我等公交车时开始下雨了。
items.en: It began to rain while I was waiting for the bus.

items.cn: 她打电话时我正在洗碗。
items.en: I was washing the dishes when she called.

items.cn: 昨天这个时候孩子们正在上体育课。
items.en: The children were having a PE lesson at this time yesterday.

items.cn: 我们已经完成了小组项目。
items.en: We have already finished our group project.
Have you ever visited the Shanghai Museum?
items.hint: 询问经历用现在完成时

items.cn: 他从六岁起就学习游泳。
items.en: He has learned to swim since he was six.

items.cn: 我还没有收到她的邮件。
items.en: I have not received her email yet.
items.hint: yet 常用于完成时否定句

items.cn: 这家书店已经开了十年。
items.en: This bookshop has been open for ten years.
They have just arrived at the railway station.

items.cn: 这是我看过的最有趣的电影。
items.en: This is the most interesting film I have ever seen.

items.cn: 我以前从未尝过这种食物。
items.en: I have never tasted this kind of food before.

items.cn: 明年我们学校将建一座新图书馆。
items.en: Our school will build a new library next year.
items.hint: next year 用一般将来时

items.en: I am going to learn first aid during the summer holiday.

items.cn: 将来会有更多环保公交车。
items.en: There will be more green buses in the future.
She will not attend the meeting tonight.
items.hint: will not 表示将来否定

items.cn: 你明天会和我们一起植树吗？
items.en: Will you plant trees with us tomorrow?

items.cn: 看那些乌云，马上要下雨了。
items.en: Look at the dark clouds. It is going to rain soon.
The train will arrive in ten minutes.
items.hint: in + 时间段表示多久以后

items.cn: 如果你现在出发，就不会迟到。
items.en: If you leave now, you will not be late.

items.cn: 只要坚持练习，你就会进步。
items.en: You will improve as long as you keep practising.
items.hint: as long as 引导条件

items.cn: 尽管任务很难，我们没有放弃。
items.en: Although the task was difficult, we did not give up.

items.cn: 因为错过了公交车，他走路去学校。
